title: agent.completed payload (v1)
description: Emitted whenever an AI agent run finishes (cost + outcome). Published from MULTIPLE producers that all share the SAME shape: the shared ai-engine persist hook (packages/ai-engine/src/persist.ts, used by every service that runs an agent), plus the resume-service parse pipeline and the screening worker. Matches the typed AgentRunCompletedPayloadSchema. `triggeredByUserId` is a LAX nullable string — a real user UUID for user-triggered runs, or a sentinel like "system"/"public" for event-driven runs.
x-producer: ai-engine persist hook (shared by all agent-running services), resume-service parse pipeline, screening-service worker, job-service jd-author route
x-consumers: billing-service (upsert AgentRunCost — per-run cost projection keyed on agentRunId)

agentRunId.description: Agent run id — the billing upsert key.

modelName.description: Model used. Optional — older publishers may omit it; consumer stores null when absent.

iterations.description: ReAct loop iteration count. Optional — single-shot runs / older publishers may omit it.

triggeredByUserId.description: User UUID for user-triggered runs, a sentinel ("system"/"public") for event-driven runs, or null.
